  "verses": [

      "n": 46,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Wajtew Moab! tee Lau-
dis no Kamog irr bohja gahju-
chi/ jo tavt Dehti irr noxemti
Beetuma/ ir tavtas Meitas Zee-
tuma.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 47,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet pehdigâ Laikâ griƀ-
bu es Moaba Zeetumu atgreest/
fakka tas KUNGS: Lihdstchim
no Moaba Sohdibas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Rett teem Ammona
Behrueem fakka tas
KUNGS ta: Neggi
tad Israëtani irr Behrni? Ir-
eg winnam ne kahds Mant-
neeks? Rapehz irr tad Malkome
Mantneeks no Gada/ un win-
kn Laudis dsihwo eeksch ta pa-
cha Pilsfahteein?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tadeht raugi/ tahs Dee-
nas nahks/ fakka tas KUNGS:
Ka es pahr Rabbu to Ammona
Behrnu likschu weenu Karra-
Brehtschann dsirdeht/ un ta taps
par weenu pohstitu Kohpu/ un
winnas peederrigas Weetas
taps ar Ugguni eededsinatas.
Un Israëls eemantohs favus Ge-
mantotajus/ fakka tas KUNgs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Rauz ak Esbon! jo Aja irr
pohstita/ kanzeet juhs Meitas
no Rabbas/ apjohseet Maitus/
waideet/ un skaidajt apkahrt us
Muhteem/ jo Malkoms ees Zee-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ko leelijees tu ar tawahm
Eeleijehm? Tawas Eeleijas irr
pahrpluhduschas/ tu atkahpaja
Meita/ kas us sawahm Man-
tahm patanjahs/ ( unt sakka:)
Kurſch prett mannim zelsees?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Reds/ Es weddischu pahr
tewi Bihjaschann/ fakka kas
Kungs KUNGS Zebaot:
Preeksch wisfeem/ kas apkahre
tewim irraid/ ka ikkatrs no juuns
fawa Preekscha taps tsdsihts/
un neweens buhs/ kas tohs Mal-
doschus faptulzina.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet pehz to atgreesischu es
atkak to Zeetunu to Ammona
Behrnu/fakka tas KUNGS:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Prett Eedomu fakka tas
KUNGS Zebaot ta: Neggi tad
wairs irr Gudriba eeksch Te-
mana? Irrag tas Padohms ts-
nihzis pee teem Saprattegeem?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Irrag winno Gudriba ne-
leeta tuppuki? Behdseet/ greese-
tees/ apflepjeetees dsittâs Wee-
tas/ juhs Gedsihwotaji no Deda-
na/ jo es weddu Melaimibu pahr
Eesawu winna Peemeſſefchanas
Laika.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ja Wihna-Laftaji pahr
tewim buhtu nahknſcht/ tad buh-
tu tee kahdus Rekkarus atlizzi-
najſchi/ kad buhtu Sagti Nakti
nahknſchi/ ne buhtu tee kamattaj-
schi zik preeksch wi3neem gan
bija?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet es efimu Eesawu at-
fedsis/ es efimu winna apflehyp-
"
    }
